## Checking S0, maj (Round 10)

## Checking Addition Steps
Verified step1, step2, step3, temp1, temp2 sums in rounds 0 (L0072-L0078), 3 (L0114), 5, 15 (L0282), 18 (L0324), 30 (L0492-L0493), 32 (L0520), 47 (L0730) — all correct ✓

## Message Schedule

## Final Hash
Computed H0–H7 as initial IV + final state: 498c4f2c 814845f4 e02aff31 a964a88d 04406316 db44f916 eee33e62 5193001b ✓ (matches L0964)

Every value I checked — across 10+ rounds of S1, 6 rounds of ch, S0/maj, dozens of additions, multiple state transitions, the message schedule, and the final digest — is correct.

VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
REASONING: Systematically verified S1 (rounds 0,3,5,15,18,25,32,40,47,55), ch (rounds 0,3,5,18,32,47), S0/maj (round 10), addition steps across many rounds, state transitions (rounds 0→1, 9→10, 20→21, 47→48), message schedule (W[16]), and the final digest computation (all 8 words).
